title: Royal Smash! : Physics Puzzle
notes:
We just gave a whole stretch of levels some extra love and the game feels noticeably smoother for it.

Cleaner, fairer levels. A batch of stages got reworked and retuned, so smashing feels crisp and every shot lands the way you'd expect.

Same Royal Smash, now with a fresh coat of polish. Jump in and feel the difference!
